name: Split Grid + Improve Quality
description: Splits a 2x2 grid image into 4 individual panels, then sends each panel to PixVerse for quality improvement across 3 models (Seedream 4.5 4K, GPT-2 2K, Nano Banana 2 4K), all in 16:9 format.
fullText: Splits a 2x2 grid image into 4 individual panels, then sends each panel to PixVerse for quality improvement across 3 models (Seedream 4.5 4K, GPT-2 2K, Nano Banana 2 4K), all in 16:9 format.
